finding_results.notes: The reveal now changes shape across distinct beats: mixed-autonomy system proof, June's dated manual interventions, sexual exploitation through source/voice assets, a live Eli check-in while June is still upstairs, and the payment strategy pane before June re-enters.

June now explicitly says the outage forced her to dump work tabs onto the personal laptop, warns Lena off the minimized tabs, and the desktop description confirms a hurried storm-driven reshuffle rather than casual negligence.

The incorrect invented transfer amounts were removed, and the payment pane was rebuilt around transfer tiers plus continuity-sheet barrier numbers ($4.2k taxes, approx. $18.6k trailer proceeds). The allowed inputs did not expose a canonical receipt-by-receipt ledger, so the pane no longer contradicts known continuity but does not restate exact transfer amounts.
